title: cladium schoenoides
intro: Cladium schoenoides, also known as sawgrass or marsh club-rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cladium schoenoides include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing coughs. Cladium schoenoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
